{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211808026797C35442729F031CFF"}"},"total":397},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7493194066488476440","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！作为一个30年的老书虫，现在能看进去的小说太少了！这本书一读进来就爱不释手。情节引人入胜，人物刻画饱满！群像塑造非常成功！各个人物性格做事风格鲜明，让人读过就忘不了，是近几年来不可多得的好书。大赞！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744650019,"group_id":"7399396405892090905","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny7SvGlDIae6uGCDW3RtOOQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/user-avatar/96f35bff58b415feabe7606b7f4c5634~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621390&x-signature=jCW0KDLUQIrD4qpgWS9z5r4TyhQ%3D","user_id":"110830690891","user_name":"天下"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110830690891","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1728663636,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399396405892090905","book_info":{"abstract":"（原书名：《黑道绝响》）
江湖是什么？
江湖不是打打杀杀，是人情世故？
错了，只有打打杀杀过后还能站着的人，才有资格谈人情事故。
我叫罗平，见证了西南一隅所谓江湖，从辉煌鼎盛到日到西山，再到最后江湖成为绝响。
这是我的故事，也是江湖的一处缩影。
没有一打十的超人，也没有虎躯一震，八方拜倒的大哥。
有的只是一群普通人，在这个江湖中挣扎求生。
这是一个故事，充斥着那个年代的悲欢。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/900fcea17a52188b81bc4ee8029014c5","author":"治愈系的斗啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7399396405892090905","book_name":"枭黔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7399423182932804121","read_count":"44143","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000273"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"468","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/beae756f35957a5457cc2512df92e3f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779271682&x-signature=hnBwaXbEo4HpAeepMEHs3e1Xf4E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"80355594775","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"731"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211808026797C35442729F031CFF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读54小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":36315,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":195594,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":15687},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7531182922395796249","
